about.label: About Us
about.hero_desc: Are you looking for the right business partners in the Danish-German border region? Business-region helps companies find new business opportunities, build networks and create growth. Experience the benefits of stronger business collaboration – contact us today.
about.mission_text_1: Are you looking for the right partners in the Danish-German border region? Business DE-DK helps companies find new business opportunities, build networks and create growth — across the border.
about.mission_text_2: We strengthen business collaboration in the border region. We help companies find the right partners, gain access to relevant business information and create growth opportunities on both sides of the border.
about.focus_1_desc: Mapping regional opportunities and needs through research and analysis.
about.focus_2_desc: Establishing cross-border business networks connecting professionals.
about.focus_3_desc: Sharing knowledge and stories through our media channels.
about.focus_5_desc: Attracting and retaining regional talent across the border.
about.focus_6_desc: Facilitating cross-border economic advancement and innovation.
about.vision_text: A thriving, integrated cross-border economy where businesses, talent, and innovation flow freely across the Germany–Denmark border.
about.vision_quote: A thriving, integrated cross-border economy where businesses, talent, and innovation flow freely across the Germany–Denmark border.
about.funding_text: Business DE-DK is co-funded by the European Regional Development Fund through the Interreg Deutschland-Danmark programme.

support.label: Support the project
support.title: Help us keep cross-border work going
support.intro: Business DE-DK is co-funded by Interreg Deutschland-Danmark, but project funding is time-limited. Voluntary contributions help us continue interviews, events and matchmaking beyond the funded project period — and tackle the regional labour shortage together.
support.privacy: Payment is processed by our partner provider. We never store card details.
support.impact_1: More interviews with stakeholders from the border region
support.impact_2: Networking events and workshops on both sides of the border
support.impact_3: Continuity of the project beyond the Interreg funding period
support.impact_4: Open, public access to regional insights and data
support.success_text: We will be in touch shortly. Your contribution helps us keep cross-border work going.
